message:
Add Start_Error exception and raise it if we detect something wrong during startup
When starting, check that we have a security manager and raise Start_Error.
This is an indication that the Initialize procedure was not called (if we continue
a Constraint_Error is raised which brings more confusion than anything else)
Handle the Start_Error exception in the commands

author: Stephane Carrez
message:
In finalize of service context, an exception could occur during database
rollback and this causes a finalize/adjust exception being raised which is
almost impossible to understand the root cause.  Catch the exception
and report an error with the exception.

author: Stephane Carrez
message:
Improvement of login forms

Added the following configuration settings:
- app_login_register to enable/disable the user registration form,
- app_login_email to enable/disable the login with email/password,
- app_login_openid to enable/disable the login with OpenId/OAuth2
- app_login_methods to control the list of OAuth2 supported providers

Add GitHub and GitLab as login methods
